title: ageratina chapalensis
intro: Ageratina chapalensis, also known as Mexican mint, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family native to Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ageratina chapalensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and relieving digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it accessible for individuals seeking natural remedies.
